fields.name: uiStyle
fields.label: UI Style
fields.description: The overall look & feel. Independent of the season — the seasonal colors carry over into every style.

fields.name: navCtaUrl
fields.label: Nav Button Link
fields.description: Shown in the navbar on the Editorial / Sanctuary / Immersive styles.

fields.name: layout
fields.label: Layout
fields.description: How this section looks. Pick one; only the matching fields below are used.

options.label: Splash / Hero (text over a full-width image)

fields.name: eyebrow
fields.label: Eyebrow
fields.description: Splash layout. The small tracked line above the heading, e.g. "MASSAGE + SOUND HEALING".

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body Text
fields.description: Used by Splash, Image + Text, Centered Text, and Event layouts.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Image
fields.description: Image + Text layout, and the background photo for the Splash layout.

fields.name: taglinePlacement
fields.label: Tagline Artwork
fields.description: Splash layout only. Where to put the "Your Integrative Healer / You are Resilient" artwork. In both Beside and Over, the artwork carries the words, so the heading, eyebrow and body are not shown — only the buttons.

fields.name: taglineBlend
fields.label: Tagline Blend %
fields.description: Only used by "Over the photo". How strongly the artwork sits on the photo, 10–100. Lower lets more of the photo through. Defaults to 88.

fields.name: overlayAlign
fields.label: Splash Text Position
fields.description: Splash layout only — where the overlaid text sits on the photo. Each UI Style also has its own default feel.

fields.name: imageSide
fields.label: Image Placement
fields.description: Auto alternates sides down the page. Pick Left or Right to pin it.

fields.name: imageWidth
fields.label: Image Width (%)
fields.description: How wide the image is vs. the text, 20–70. Blank = 45 (balanced).

fields.name: images
fields.label: Images
fields.description: Event layout (one or more images).

fields.name: cards
fields.label: Cards
fields.description: Card Grid layout.

fields.name: words
fields.label: Values
fields.description: Values List layout.

fields.name: spacing
fields.label: Vertical Spacing
fields.description: How much space above and below this component.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.description: Ignored when a Linked Service is set (status comes from that service).

fields.name: service
fields.label: Linked Service (optional)
fields.description: Type the exact Heading of a Service card on this page to tie this button to it. The button then shows Available or Coming Soon based on THAT service’s status.

fields.name: showHomeButton
fields.label: Show "Home" button
fields.description: Adds a Home button (links to the home page). On by default; turn off to hide.

fields.name: imageSide
fields.label: Image Placement
fields.description: Auto alternates sides down the page. Pick Left or Right to pin it.

fields.name: imageWidth
fields.label: Image Width (%)
fields.description: How wide the image is vs. the text, 20–70. Blank = 45 (balanced).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.description: Coming Soon disables this service’s booking buttons and shows a badge.

fields.name: service
fields.label: Add-on Service
fields.description: Type the exact Heading of another Service card. Its button shows Available or Coming Soon based on THAT service’s Status.

fields.name: bookUrl
fields.label: Booking URL (this session + add-on, used when the add-on is available)

fields.name: spacing
fields.label: Vertical Spacing
fields.description: How much space above and below this component.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.description: Ignored when a Linked Service is set (status comes from that service).

fields.name: service
fields.label: Linked Service (optional)
fields.description: Type the exact Heading of a Service card on this page to tie this button to it. The button then shows Available or Coming Soon based on THAT service’s status.

fields.name: showHomeButton
fields.label: Show "Home" button
fields.description: Adds a Home button (links to the home page). On by default; turn off to hide.

fields.name: source
fields.label: Source
fields.description: Which tool this embed comes from (just a label for your reference).

fields.name: mode
fields.label: Embed Type
fields.description: URL = paste the iframe/share link (simplest; best for Canva & OfferingTree). Code = paste the full snippet (needed for Kit forms that use a <script>).

fields.name: url
fields.label: Embed URL
fields.description: URL mode. e.g. a Canva “smart embed” link or an OfferingTree schedule/offering URL.

fields.name: code
fields.label: Embed Code
fields.description: Code mode. Paste the exact snippet the tool gives you — its <script> tags will run.

fields.name: height
fields.label: Height (px)
fields.description: Height of the embed frame in URL mode. Blank = 640.

fields.name: spacing
fields.label: Vertical Spacing
fields.description: How much space above and below this component.

fields.name: showHomeButton
fields.label: Show "Home" button
fields.description: Adds a Home button (links to the home page). On by default; turn off to hide.
